<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ONO — Drop Culture</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Black+Ops+One&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --bg:#04040a;
  --surface:#0d0d1a;
  --white:#f0eeff;
  --neon:#b8ff57;
  --neon2:#57e8ff;
  --neon3:#ff57b8;
  --gray:#4a4a6a;
  --light:#9898c0;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none}

#cursor{position:fixed;width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--neon);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s;mix-blend-mode:difference}
#cursor-ring{position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.5);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:transform .15s ease-out}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:1000;opacity:.4}

nav{position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:500;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:1.2rem 4rem;background:rgba(4,4,10,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.1);animation:slideDown .8s ease both}
@keyframes slideDown{from{transform:translateY(-100%);opacity:0}to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}}
.logo-nav{font-family:'Black Ops One',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--neon);text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(184,255,87,.5);animation:glow 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes glow{0%,100%{text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(184,255,87,.5)}50%{text-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(184,255,87,1),0 0 100px rgba(184,255,87,.3)}}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{color:var(--light);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;transition:color .2s;position:relative}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:var(--neon);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--neon)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.cart-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;background:var(--neon);color:#04040a;border:none;cursor:none;padding:.6rem 1.4rem;border-radius:50px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:900;transition:all .25s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cart-pill:hover{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(184,255,87,.6)}
.cart-badge{background:#04040a;color:var(--neon);width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:900;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding-top:80px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;text-align:center}
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(184,255,87,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(184,255,87,.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px;animation:gridMove 20s linear infinite}
@keyframes gridMove{from{background-position:0 0}to{background-position:60px 60px}}
.orb{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);animation:orbFloat 8s ease-in-out infinite}
.orb1{width:400px;height:400px;background:rgba(124,58,237,.15);top:-100px;right:-100px}
.orb2{width:300px;height:300px;background:rgba(184,255,87,.08);bottom:-50px;left:-50px;animation-delay:-3s}
.orb3{width:250px;height:250px;background:rgba(87,232,255,.08);top:40%;left:10%;animation-delay:-5s}
@keyframes orbFloat{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}33%{transform:translate(30px,-40px) scale(1.1)}66%{transform:translate(-20px,20px) scale(.95)}}
.hero-eyebrow{font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--neon);margin-bottom:1.5rem;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s .5s ease both;position:relative;z-index:2}
.hero-title{font-family:'Black Ops One',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(5rem,15vw,13rem);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:-2px;color:var(--white);position:relative;z-index:2;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s .7s ease both}
.ono-letter{display:inline-block;animation:letterBounce 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.ono-letter:nth-child(1){animation-delay:0s;color:var(--neon)}
.ono-letter:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.15s}
.ono-letter:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.3s;color:var(--neon2)}
@keyframes letterBounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px)}}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.hero-sub{font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--light);max-width:500px;line-height:1.8;margin:2rem auto;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s .9s ease both;position:relative;z-index:2}
.hero-sub span{color:var(--neon);font-weight:700}
.hero-cta-row{display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;opacity:0;animation:fadeUp .8s 1.1s ease both;position:relative;z-index:2}
.btn-glow{background:var(--neon);color:#04040a;border:none;cursor:none;padding:1rem 2.8rem;border-radius:50px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:1px;text-decoration:none;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(184,255,87,.3)}
.btn-glow:hover{transform:translateY(-3px) scale(1.04);box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(184,255,87,.7)}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--white);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);cursor:none;padding:1rem 2.2rem;border-radius:50px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;transition:all .3s}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--neon2);color:var(--neon2)}

/* FLOATING SHIRTS */
.float-shirts{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}
.float-shirt{position:absolute;opacity:.05;filter:blur(1px);animation:floatUp 15s linear infinite}
@keyframes floatUp{0%{transform:translateY(110vh) rotate(0deg);opacity:0}10%{opacity:.05}90%{opacity:.05}100%{transform:translateY(-10vh) rotate(360deg);opacity:0}}

/* TICKER */
.ticker{overflow:hidden;background:var(--neon);padding:.7rem 0}
.ticker-track{display:flex;animation:ticker 25s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap}
.ticker-item{font-family:'Black Ops One',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:#04040a;padding:0 2rem;flex-shrink:0}
@keyframes ticker{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* SCROLL PROGRESS */
#progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--neon);z-index:600;width:0%;box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--neon)}

/* SECTIONS */
section{padding:6rem 5rem}
.s-label{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--neon);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:block}
.s-title{font-family:'Black Ops One',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.5rem);letter-spacing:3px;line-height:1.1}

/* PRODUCTS */
.prod-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:3rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem}
.filters{display:flex;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.filt{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:var(--light);cursor:none;padding:.45rem 1.2rem;border-radius:50px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .2s}
.filt:hover,.filt.on{background:var(--neon);border-color:var(--neon);color:#04040a}
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:1.5rem}

/* PRODUCT CARD */
.pcard{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;transition:all .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);cursor:none;position:relative}
.pcard:hover{transform:translateY(-10px) scale(1.02);border-color:rgba(184,255,87,.4);box-shadow:0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 0 40px rgba(184,255,87,.1)}
.pimg{aspect-ratio:1/1;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.pimg img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .6s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);display:block}
.pcard:hover .pimg img{transform:scale(1.1)}
.pimg-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(4,4,10,.8) 0%,transparent 50%);opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.pcard:hover .pimg-overlay{opacity:1}
.pbadge{position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1rem;z-index:2;padding:.3rem .8rem;border-radius:50px;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:2px}
.pbadge-new{background:var(--neon);color:#04040a}
.pbadge-hot{background:var(--neon3);color:#04040a}
.pbadge-ltd{background:var(--neon2);color:#04040a}
.pinfo{padding:1.2rem 1.4rem 1.4rem}
.pcat{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--neon);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.pname{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:.8rem}
.pcolors{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-bottom:1rem}
.pdot{width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);cursor:none;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.pdot:hover{transform:scale(1.5);box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(184,255,87,.6)}
.pfoot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.pprice{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--neon)}
.pprice .old{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--gray);text-decoration:line-through;margin-right:.4rem}
.padd{background:transparent;border:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.3);color:var(--neon);cursor:none;padding:.5rem 1rem;border-radius:50px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;transition:all .25s}
.padd:hover{background:var(--neon);color:#04040a;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(184,255,87,.4)}
.padd.done{background:rgba(87,232,255,.1);border-color:var(--neon2);color:var(--neon2)}

/* SHIRT PARADE */
.parade-section{overflow:hidden;padding:3rem 0;background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.parade-track{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;animation:parade 20s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap}
.parade-track:nth-child(2){animation-direction:reverse;animation-duration:25s;margin-top:1.5rem}
.parade-card{flex-shrink:0;width:140px;height:140px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s;cursor:none}
.parade-card:hover{transform:scale(1.1) rotate(-3deg);border-color:rgba(184,255,87,.4)}
.parade-card img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:grayscale(.3)}
.parade-card:hover img{filter:grayscale(0)}
@keyframes parade{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* STORY */
.story-section{background:var(--bg);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:center}
.story-visual{position:relative}
.story-main-img{width:100%;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.story-main-img img{width:100%;height:420px;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .6s ease}
.story-main-img:hover img{transform:scale(1.05)}
.story-main-img::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(184,255,87,.08),transparent);z-index:1;pointer-events:none}
.story-float-card{position:absolute;background:rgba(4,4,10,.92);border:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.2);border-radius:12px;padding:.8rem 1.2rem;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);animation:floatCard 4s ease-in-out infinite}
.story-float-card:nth-child(2){bottom:-1rem;left:-2rem;animation-delay:-2s}
.story-float-card:nth-child(3){top:1rem;left:-3rem;animation-delay:-1s}
@keyframes floatCard{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}}
.fc-label{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--neon);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.fc-val{font-size:1rem;font-weight:900}
.story-text .s-title{margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.story-text p{color:var(--light);line-height:1.9;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.story-text p span{color:var(--neon);font-weight:700}

/* FEATURES */
.feat-section{background:var(--surface)}
.feat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.feat{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem;transition:all .3s;cursor:none}
.feat:hover{background:rgba(184,255,87,.04);border-color:rgba(184,255,87,.2);transform:translateY(-5px)}
.feat-icon{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:12px;background:rgba(184,255,87,.1);border:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;transition:all .3s}
.feat:hover .feat-icon{background:var(--neon);transform:rotate(10deg) scale(1.1)}
.feat h4{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.feat p{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--light);line-height:1.7}

/* REVIEWS */
.reviews-section{background:var(--bg)}
.rev-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.rcard{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem;transition:all .3s}
.rcard:hover{border-color:rgba(184,255,87,.2);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.rstars{color:var(--neon);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1rem}
.rtxt{color:var(--light);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:1.3rem}
.rauthor{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem}
.ravatar{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(184,255,87,.15);border:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.3);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--neon)}
.rname{font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem}
.rcity{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--gray)}

/* NEWSLETTER */
.nl-section{background:var(--surface);text-align:center;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.nl-section .s-title{margin-bottom:1rem}
.nl-section p{color:var(--light);margin-bottom:2rem}
.nl-form{display:flex;max-width:460px;margin:0 auto;border-radius:50px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.3)}
.nl-form input{flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:none;color:var(--white);padding:.9rem 1.5rem;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;outline:none}
.nl-form input::placeholder{color:var(--gray)}
.nl-form button{background:var(--neon);border:none;color:#04040a;cursor:none;padding:.9rem 1.8rem;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:900;transition:background .2s}
.nl-form button:hover{background:#9fd93e}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:#030309;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);padding:3rem 5rem}
.foot-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.foot-logo{font-family:'Black Ops One',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--neon);display:block;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.foot-brand p{color:var(--gray);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.8;max-width:250px}
.foot-col h5{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:4px;color:var(--neon);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.foot-col ul{list-style:none}
.foot-col ul li{margin-bottom:.7rem}
.foot-col ul li a{color:var(--gray);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;transition:color .2s}
.foot-col ul li a:hover{color:var(--white)}
.foot-bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);padding-top:1.5rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.foot-bottom p{color:var(--gray);font-size:.8rem}

/* CART */
.overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);z-index:700;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s;backdrop-filter:blur(6px)}
.overlay.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.drawer{position:fixed;top:0;left:-440px;width:440px;height:100vh;background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.15);z-index:701;transition:left .4s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:1.8rem}
.drawer.on{left:0}
.dhead{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem;padding-bottom:1rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.dhead h3{font-family:'Black Ops One',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;letter-spacing:4px;color:var(--neon)}
.dclose{background:none;border:none;color:var(--light);cursor:none;font-size:1.4rem;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s}
.dclose:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:var(--white);transform:rotate(90deg)}
.ditems{flex:1;overflow-y:auto}
.ditem{display:flex;gap:1rem;align-items:center;padding:1rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);animation:slideIn .3s ease}
@keyframes slideIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}
.ditem-img{width:70px;height:70px;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.ditem-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.ditem-info{flex:1}
.ditem-name{font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.ditem-price{color:var(--neon);font-weight:900}
.ditem-rm{background:none;border:none;color:var(--gray);cursor:none;font-size:1rem;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s}
.ditem-rm:hover{background:rgba(255,87,87,.1);color:#ff5757}
.dempty{text-align:center;padding:3rem 1rem;color:var(--gray);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:1rem;font-size:2rem}
.dempty span{font-size:.9rem}
.dfoot{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-top:1.5rem;margin-top:1rem}
.dtotal{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.dtotal span:first-child{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--light)}
.dtotal span:last-child{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--neon)}
.dcheckout{width:100%;background:var(--neon);border:none;color:#04040a;cursor:none;padding:1.1rem;border-radius:50px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:1px;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(184,255,87,.3)}
.dcheckout:hover{transform:scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(184,255,87,.6)}

/* TOAST */
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;right:2rem;background:rgba(13,13,26,.95);border:1px solid rgba(184,255,87,.3);color:var(--neon);padding:.9rem 1.6rem;border-radius:50px;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;z-index:800;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);transform:translateY(80px);opacity:0;transition:all .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.toast.on{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:all .6s ease}
.reveal.shown{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-ring"></div>
<div id="progress"></div>

<nav>
  <div class="logo-nav">ONO</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#products">DROPS</a></li>
    <li><a href="#story">STORY</a></li>
    <li><a href="#reviews">VIBES</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="cart-pill" onclick="toggleCart()">
    🛍 السلة <span class="cart-badge" id="cartBadge">0</span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="orb orb1"></div>
  <div class="orb orb2"></div>
  <div class="orb orb3"></div>
  <div class="float-shirts" id="floatShirts"></div>
  <div class="hero-eyebrow">✦ SUMMER DROP 2025 ✦</div>
  <div class="hero-title">
    <span class="ono-letter">O</span><span class="ono-letter">N</span><span class="ono-letter">O</span>
  </div>
  <p class="hero-sub">مش بس تيشيرت — <span>ستيتمنت</span>.<br>كل قطعة محدودة. كل تصميم حكاية.</p>
  <div class="hero-cta-row">
    <a href="#products" class="btn-glow">شوف الدروبات</a>
    <a href="#story" class="btn-ghost">قصتنا</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TICKER -->
<div class="ticker"><div class="ticker-track" id="tickerTrack"></div></div>

<!-- PRODUCTS -->
<section id="products">
  <div class="prod-header">
    <div>
      <span class="s-label">✦ LATEST DROPS</span>
      <div class="s-title">الكولكشن</div>
    </div>
    <div class="filters">
      <button class="filt on" onclick="filt('all',this)">EVERYTHING</button>
      <button class="filt" onclick="filt('tshirt',this)">T-SHIRT</button>
      <button class="filt" onclick="filt('polo',this)">POLO</button>
      <button class="filt" onclick="filt('ltd',this)">LIMITED</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid" id="grid"></div>
</section>

<!-- PARADE -->
<div class="parade-section">
  <div class="parade-track" id="parade1"></div>
  <div class="parade-track" id="parade2"></div>
</div>

<!-- STORY -->
<section class="story-section reveal" id="story">
  <div class="story-visual">
    <div class="story-main-img">
      <img id="storyImg" src="" alt="ONO Story">
    </div>
    <div class="story-float-card">
      <div class="fc-label">QUALITY</div>
      <div class="fc-val">قطن 100% 🇪🇬</div>
    </div>
    <div class="story-float-card">
      <div class="fc-label">DROPS</div>
      <div class="fc-val">كل أسبوع 🔥</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="story-text">
    <span class="s-label">✦ OUR STORY</span>
    <div class="s-title">ONO مش<br>ماركة — ثقافة</div>
    <p>اتولدنا في القاهرة سنة 2023 من <span>شغف بالتصميم والجودة</span>. كنا زهقنا من اللبس التقليدي.</p>
    <p>قررنا نعمل حاجة <span>مختلفة</span> — تيشيرتات بتحكي قصة، بخامة بتحس فيها، بتصاميم ما تلاقيهاش تاني.</p>
    <a href="#products" class="btn-glow">اشتري دلوقتي</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section class="feat-section reveal">
  <div class="feat-grid">
    <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🧵</div><h4>قطن مصري أصيل</h4><p>أجود خامات من دلتا النيل — ناعمة ومريحة طوال اليوم</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🚀</div><h4>شحن في 48 ساعة</h4><p>اطلب دلوقتي وهيوصلك خلال يومين لأي مكان في مصر</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🔄</div><h4>استبدال مضمون</h4><p>مش عاجبك؟ استبدله في خلال 30 يوم بدون أسئلة</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">⚡</div><h4>دروبات أسبوعية</h4><p>تصاميم جديدة كل أسبوع — اشترك في النيوزليتر أول</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- REVIEWS -->
<section class="reviews-section reveal" id="reviews">
  <div class="prod-header">
    <div><span class="s-label">✦ REAL VIBES</span><div class="s-title">بيقولوا إيه</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="rev-grid">
    <div class="rcard"><div class="rstars">★★★★★</div><div class="rtxt">"جودة خرافية! التيشيرت ناعم وخامة فرق واضح. هطلب تاني ١٠٠٪"</div><div class="rauthor"><div class="ravatar">أح</div><div><div class="rname">أحمد حسين</div><div class="rcity">القاهرة</div></div></div></div>
    <div class="rcard"><div class="rstars">★★★★★</div><div class="rtxt">"أخيرا ماركة مصرية بجودة عالمية! التصاميم مختلفة والشحن وصل في يومين."</div><div class="rauthor"><div class="ravatar">سم</div><div><div class="rname">سارة محمود</div><div class="rcity">الإسكندرية</div></div></div></div>
    <div class="rcard"><div class="rstars">★★★★☆</div><div class="rtxt">"الپولو خرافي! لبسته في شغل وكل الناس سألت عليه. بنصح بيه للجميع."</div><div class="rauthor"><div class="ravatar">مع</div><div><div class="rname">محمد علي</div><div class="rcity">الجيزة</div></div></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- NEWSLETTER -->
<section class="nl-section reveal">
  <span class="s-label">✦ STAY IN THE LOOP</span>
  <div class="s-title">كن أول واحد</div>
  <p style="margin-top:.8rem">اشترك واحصل على خصم 15% على أول طلب</p>
  <div class="nl-form">
    <input type="email" placeholder="إيميلك..." id="emailInput">
    <button onclick="subscribe()">اشترك</button>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="foot-grid">
    <div class="foot-brand"><span class="foot-logo">ONO</span><p>ماركة مصرية 100٪ — تيشيرتات بريميوم للمميزين. بنؤمن إن اللبس الكويس بيفرق.</p></div>
    <div class="foot-col"><h5>DROPS</h5><ul><li><a href="#">الكل</a></li><li><a href="#">T-Shirt</a></li><li><a href="#">Polo</a></li><li><a href="#">محدود</a></li></ul></div>
    <div class="foot-col"><h5>HELP</h5><ul><li><a href="#">الاستبدال</a></li><li><a href="#">تتبع الطلب</a></li><li><a href="#">المقاسات</a></li><li><a href="#">تواصل معنا</a></li></ul></div>
    <div class="foot-col"><h5>FOLLOW</h5><ul><li><a href="#">إنستجرام</a></li><li><a href="#">تيك توك</a></li><li><a href="#">فيسبوك</a></li></ul></div>
  </div>
  <div class="foot-bottom">
    <p>© 2025 ONO. جميع الحقوق محفوظة.</p>
    <p>صُنع في مصر 🇪🇬</p>
  </div>
</footer>

<div class="overlay" id="overlay" onclick="toggleCart()"></div>
<div class="drawer" id="drawer">
  <div class="dhead"><h3>ONO BAG</h3><button class="dclose" onclick="toggleCart()">✕</button></div>
  <div class="ditems" id="ditems"><div class="dempty">🛍<span>السلة فاضية</span></div></div>
  <div class="dfoot" id="dfoot" style="display:none">
    <div class="dtotal"><span>الإجمالي</span><span id="dtotal">0 ج.م</span></div>
    <button class="dcheckout" onclick="checkout()">أتمم الطلب ⚡</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
const imgs = {
  1: "data:image/png;base64,",
  2: "data:image/png;base64,",
  3: "data:image/png;base64,",
  4: "data:image/png;base64,",
  5: "data:image/png;base64,",
  6: "data:image/png;base64,",
};

const prods = [
  {id:1,name:'Washed Oversized Tee',cat:'tshirt',price:299,old:350,badge:'hot',colors:['#aaa','#888','#666']},
  {id:2,name:'Brooklyn Polo',cat:'polo',price:269,old:null,badge:'new',colors:['#fff','#1a5c2e','#c8a96e']},
  {id:3,name:'Burberry Polo',cat:'ltd',price:499,old:null,badge:'ltd',colors:['#c8a86a','#1a1a1a','#8b1a1a']},
  {id:4,name:'Ribbed Knit Polo',cat:'polo',price:329,old:null,badge:'new',colors:['#fff','#eee','#ddd']},
  {id:5,name:'Moncler Polo',cat:'ltd',price:549,old:null,badge:'ltd',colors:['#1a5c1a','#fff','#c8392b']},
  {id:6,name:'Classic Clean Polo',cat:'polo',price:249,old:280,badge:null,colors:['#555','#333','#222']},
];
const badgeLabel={new:'NEW',hot:'HOT 🔥',ltd:'LIMITED'};
const badgeClass={new:'pbadge-new',hot:'pbadge-hot',ltd:'pbadge-ltd'};
let cart=[];

function renderGrid(filter='all'){
  const g=document.getElementById('grid');
  const list=filter==='all'?prods:prods.filter(p=>p.cat===filter);
  g.innerHTML=list.map(p=>`
    <div class="pcard">
      <div class="pimg">
        <img src="${imgs[p.id]}" alt="${p.name}" loading="lazy">
        <div class="pimg-overlay"></div>
        ${p.badge?`<span class="pbadge ${badgeClass[p.badge]}">${badgeLabel[p.badge]}</span>`:''}
      </div>
      <div class="pinfo">
        <div class="pcat">${p.cat.toUpperCase()}</div>
        <div class="pname">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="pcolors">${p.colors.map(c=>`<div class="pdot" style="background:${c}"></div>`).join('')}</div>
        <div class="pfoot">
          <div class="pprice">${p.old?`<span class="old">${p.old} ج.م</span>`:''}${p.price} ج.م</div>
          <button class="padd" id="btn${p.id}" onclick="addCart(${p.id})">+ أضف</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function filt(f,btn){
  document.querySelectorAll('.filt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('on'));
  btn.classList.add('on');
  renderGrid(f);
}

function addCart(id){
  const p=prods.find(x=>x.id===id);
  const ex=cart.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(ex)ex.qty++;else cart.push({...p,qty:1});
  updateCart();
  const btn=document.getElementById('btn'+id);
  if(btn){btn.textContent='✓ اتضاف';btn.classList.add('done');setTimeout(()=>{btn.textContent='+ أضف';btn.classList.remove('done')},1500)}
  showToast(`✓ ${p.name} اتضاف!`);
}

function rmCart(id){cart=cart.filter(x=>x.id!==id);updateCart()}

function updateCart(){
  const count=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.qty,0);
  const badge=document.getElementById('cartBadge');
  badge.textContent=count;
  badge.style.display=count>0?'flex':'none';
  const di=document.getElementById('ditems');
  const df=document.getElementById('dfoot');
  if(!cart.length){di.innerHTML='<div class="dempty">🛍<span>السلة فاضية</span></div>';df.style.display='none';return}
  df.style.display='block';
  const total=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.price*i.qty,0);
  di.innerHTML=cart.map(i=>`<div class="ditem">
    <div class="ditem-img"><img src="${imgs[i.id]}" alt="${i.name}"></div>
    <div class="ditem-info">
      <div class="ditem-name">${i.name}${i.qty>1?` ×${i.qty}`:''}</div>
      <div class="ditem-price">${i.price*i.qty} ج.م</div>
    </div>
    <button class="ditem-rm" onclick="rmCart(${i.id})">✕</button>
  </div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('dtotal').textContent=total+' ج.م';
}

function toggleCart(){
  document.getElementById('drawer').classList.toggle('on');
  document.getElementById('overlay').classList.toggle('on');
}

function checkout(){showToast('🎉 طلبك اتأكد! هنتواصل معاك قريباً');cart=[];updateCart();toggleCart()}

function showToast(msg){const t=document.getElementById('toast');t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('on');setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('on'),3000)}

function subscribe(){
  const em=document.getElementById('emailInput');
  if(!em.value||!em.value.includes('@')){showToast('⚠️ ادخل إيميل صحيح');return}
  em.value='';showToast('✓ تم! هيوصلك كود الخصم 🎉');
}

// TICKER
const t=document.getElementById('tickerTrack');
const its=['ONO DROP 2025','قطن 100%','شحن مجاني','30 يوم استبدال','دروب أسبوعي','تصاميم حصرية','صُنع في مصر'];
t.innerHTML=[...its,...its,...its,...its].map(i=>`<span class="ticker-item">${i} ◆</span>`).join('');

// PARADE
const allImgKeys=Object.keys(imgs);
function buildParade(el){
  const items=[...allImgKeys,...allImgKeys,...allImgKeys,...allImgKeys];
  el.innerHTML=items.map(k=>`<div class="parade-card"><img src="${imgs[k]}" alt="ONO"></div>`).join('');
}
buildParade(document.getElementById('parade1'));
buildParade(document.getElementById('parade2'));

// STORY IMAGE
document.getElementById('storyImg').src=imgs[3];

// FLOATING SHIRTS
const fs=document.getElementById('floatShirts');
Object.values(imgs).slice(0,4).forEach((src,i)=>{
  const d=document.createElement('img');
  d.src=src;
  d.className='float-shirt';
  d.style.cssText=`left:${10+i*22}%;animation-delay:${i*3}s;animation-duration:${14+i*2}s;width:${80+i*20}px;height:${80+i*20}px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px;position:absolute`;
  fs.appendChild(d);
});

// CURSOR
const cursor=document.getElementById('cursor');
const ring=document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;cursor.style.left=mx+'px';cursor.style.top=my+'px'});
(function animRing(){rx+=(mx-rx)*.12;ry+=(my-ry)*.12;ring.style.left=rx+'px';ring.style.top=ry+'px';requestAnimationFrame(animRing)})();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.pcard,.feat,.rcard,.parade-card').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{cursor.style.width='24px';cursor.style.height='24px'});
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{cursor.style.width='12px';cursor.style.height='12px'});
});

// SCROLL PROGRESS + REVEAL
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  document.getElementById('progress').style.width=(window.scrollY/(document.body.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight)*100)+'%';
});
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add('shown')}),{threshold:.15});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));

renderGrid();
</script>
</body>
</html>
